title: Anatomy of a Block Header
description: A detailed breakdown of the six core components that make up a blockchain block header, showing their hierarchical structure and data flow.
relationships: The elements are stored sequentially in the block header. The Merkle Root is a hash derived from all transactions in the block. The Nonce is a variable number miners change to try and achieve a hash that meets the Difficulty Target (Bits). The Previous Block Hash links this block to the one before it, forming the chain.
